summary: Implemented guarded explicit L0 context-pack inclusion. build_latest_context_manifest can now accept explicit L0 chunk IDs, validate matching L0 summary JSON records, include them as l0_summary ContextPackItem entries, and preserve non-fatal exclusions for missing, unreadable, malformed, or mismatched records. build_context_pack.py now exposes --include-l0 and --l0-store. The renderer compactly renders validated L0 summary JSON instead of dumping raw JSON.
